---
title: "Pilot measurement summary (public)"
subtitle: "Gap 1 & Gap 2 · n = 63 · pre-extraction calibration"
description: "Public summary statistics from the PPCS aerobic pilot audit. No restricted links."
draft: true
---

Summary for **Foundation Stack** readers (pilot calibration). This is **not** formal systematic-review pooling.

## Gap 1 — adherence in Results

| Category | *n* | % |
|----------|-----|---|
| Truly objective | 11 | 17.5% |
| Truly not reported | 40 | 63.5% |
| Explicitly not measured | 8 | 12.7% |
| Subjective only | 4 | 6.3% |

**Pseudo-objectivity gap:** automated first pass flagged **41.3%** as `objective` (hardware in Methods); manual verification left **17.5%** truly objective — **23.8 percentage points**.

**Rule:** hardware in Methods ≠ adherence reported in Results.

## Gap 2 — recovery endpoints

| Finding | Count |
|---------|-------|
| Fully objective primary endpoint | **0 / 63** |
| BCTT-class (`partially_objective`) | **10 / 63** (15.9%) |
| Symptom scales / composite / unclear | **53 / 63** |

## Co-occurrence (largest cells) {#co-occurrence}

- **24 / 63:** no quantified adherence **and** unclear primary outcome structure  
- **8 / 63:** no adherence + BCTT-class primary measure  
- **6 / 63:** no adherence + symptom-scale primary  

**8 of 11** papers with truly objective adherence used a **composite** primary outcome.

## Open figures (guanglab.org)

- [Adherence lollipop](https://guanglab.org/labs/lollipop_gap.html)  
- [Thematic bubble chart](https://guanglab.org/labs/bubble_gap.html)  

## Limitations

Pilot *n* = 63 convenience-complete PDFs; ~78 additional full texts pending. Patterns may change when the full aerobic corpus is coded.

[← Foundation Stack hub](/index.html)
